content.text: This page is to summarize the configuration made for SUSD in VCU Plus
Configure the Communication wakeup sources and External IO and Local wakeup sources. And connect it to EcuM wakeup sources

items: External communication channel - These wakeup sources correspond to the external communication channels that may wakeup the ECU

content.text: For each external communication channel wakeup source SUM_SUSD_ASS will implement

items: a port “SUM_ComMMode_<ChannelName>_SwitchPort” in case of a non CAN channel a port “SUM_CanSMMode_<ChannelName>_SwitchPort” in case of a CAN channel
External I/O wakeup sources - These wakeup sources correspond to the external I/Os that may wakeup the ECU

content.text: For each external I/O wakeup source SUM_SUSD_ASS implements a port “<SUSD_External_IO_WakeupSource>” on which a SWC developed by the ECU integrator shall provide the information if the wakeup source is active or not

items: Local wakeup sources - These wakeup sources correspond to the application components of the ECU that may wakeup up other ECUs
